title: bug: stream-json parser crashes on empty chunk
body:
## Overview

The stream-json parser panics when the Claude CLI emits an empty chunk mid-stream.

## Current Behavior

Panics with `index out of bounds` at parser.rs:184.

## Expected Behavior

Empty chunks are silently skipped; the parser continues on the next frame.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run a long Claude session that emits a zero-byte stdout line.
2. Observe the panic in maestro's TUI.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Parser no longer panics on empty chunks
- [ ] An integration test reproduces the original panic on the pre-fix code
- [ ] Metrics track skipped-empty-chunk count

## Blocked By

- None

## Definition of Done

- [ ] Tests pass
- [ ] Regression test added
